Description: Human-in-the-loop review for RPA bot failures, allowing analysts to review AI diagnosis and edit recommended actions.

inputs.name: ProcessName
inputs.description: The name of the RPA process.

inputs.name: TransactionId
inputs.description: AI-generated diagnosis of the bot failure, shown read-only.

inOuts.name: RecommendedAction
inOuts.description: AI-recommended action to resolve the issue, editable by the analyst.

outcomes.name: Accept
outcomes.description: Submit the reviewed diagnosis and recommended action.

name: ActionSchema
